wet-chocolate-cake-teleculinaria.name: Wet Chocolate Cake
instructions: Fill a form with margarine and sprinkle it with flour. Start the oven at 180 degrees.
Break half the chocolate into pieces for a bowl, add the butter and let it melt in a sea bath or microwave. Remove, add the sugar and boiling water and stir well.
Noutra tigela, misture a farinha com o fermento e os ovos, ligeiramente batidos. Acrescente o preparado do chocolate, mexa bem e deite na forma.
Pique o restante chocolate, espalhe-o sobre a massa na forma e leve ao forno, durante 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer bem e, depois, desenforme. Sirva decorado a gosto.

white-bean-and-tuna-salad-with-radicchio.name: White Bean And Tuna Salad With Radicchio And Parsley Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: peeled, sliced thinly on an extreme diagonal

ingredients.item: Drained olive oil–packed tuna in a jar or good-quality canned tuna

instructions: Pulse parsley, oil, lemon juice, vinegar, and garlic in a food processor until well blended. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Place radicchio in a large bowl; drizzle with 3 Tbsp. Parsley Vinaigrette and toss to coat. Season radicchio to taste with salt and pepper. Transfer to a serving platter, spreading out in an even layer. Combine 3 Tbsp. Parsley Vinaigrette, cannellini beans, and celery in the large bowl; toss to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Arrange bean mixture on top of radicchio. Top salad with tuna and garnish with parsley. Drizzle some vinaigrette over. Reserve extra dressing for another use.

white-christmas-pie.name: White Christmas Pie
instructions: Sprinkle gelatin over cold water; set aside to soften.

Combine 1/2 cup sugar, flour, and salt in a saucepan. Gradually stir in milk. Cook over low heat, stirring until it boils. Boil for 1 minute, and remove from heat. Transfer to a large bowl. Stir in softened gelatin. When partially set, beat with a rotary mixer until smooth. Blend in vanilla and 1 cup coconut.
Whip the cream until stiff. Gently fold into coconut mixture.
Beat egg whites in a clean bowl until frothy. Beat in cream of tartar and 1/2 cup sugar. Continue beating until egg whites form stiff peaks. Fold into coconut mixture.
Pile filling into prepared pie shell. Sprinkle with additional flaked coconut. Chill pie for at least 2 hours or overnight before serving.

white-russian-cheesecake.name: White Russian Cheesecake

ingredients.prep: such as Nabisco® Famous Chocolate Wafers

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan with 4 layers of aluminum foil; set aside.

Pulse chocolate wafer cookies in a food processor until finely chopped. Add butter, 1 tablespoon sugar, espresso powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt; pulse until incorporated, about 5 times. Press cookie mixture evenly over bottom and halfway up sides of springform pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until fragrant and starting to turn crispy, 10 to 12 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside to cool while you prepare cheesecake filling. Decrease oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Combine cream cheese and remaining 1 1/3 cups sugar in the bowl of an electric stand-mixer fitted with the paddle attachment. Beat on medium-high speed until completely smooth and creamy, 1 to 2 minutes, scraping down sides as necessary. Add melted chocolate and beat until incorporated, about 30 seconds. Add sour cream and beat until combined, about 30 seconds. Add coffee liqueur, Irish cream liqueur, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt; beat on medium until combined, about 1 minute. Add eggs, 1 at a time, and beat on low until just incorporated. Pour cheesecake mixture into the cooled crust. Place the springform pan into a large roasting pan.

Place roasting pan on center rack in the oven. Carefully pour boiling water into the roasting pan to come 1 inch up the sides of the springform pan, making sure you do not get any water into the cheesecake.

Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set but still slightly jiggly in the center, 60 to 65 minutes. Turn oven off and prop open door. Let cheesecake cool in oven for 1 hour. Remove roasting pan with cheesecake from oven. Remove cheesecake from roasting pan and set aside to cool completely, about 45 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 4 hours, up to overnight.

Run a sharp paring knife around edges of crust to loosen from pan. Remove sides of springform pan. Run knife around bottom of cheesecake to loosen. Gently shimmy, or use large spatulas, to transfer cheesecake onto a cake stand or serving plate. Top with white chocolate curls. Slice and serve cold or at room temperature.

wind-fritters-traditional-recipe-pequere.name: Wind Fritters (traditional Recipe)

ingredients.item: Extra soft virgin olive oil or sunflower oil to fry

instructions: We put milk, sweet anises, water, butter and salt into a bowl.
We mix and as soon as we start to boil we put in the pounding flour and with a wooden spoon we move till it's all integrated and there's no pounding of flour.
We remove the pits from the fire and we add an egg, we mix very well and we add the second, we mix up till the whole egg's integrated and we add the third egg.
Once this last egg's been well mixed we have our dough ready. We withdraw from the fire and let them cool. Once cold we get into the refrigerator and let them rest for at least 30 minutes.
Con la ayuda de dos cucharillas, cogemos porciones de masa, y les damos formas de bola.

We put them into the frying pan with hot and cold oil till they're golden. We have to be care with the oil, and it's not to be too hot as they have to get swollen, get good inside and get really spongy. Once we have been fried, we get them and leave them on paper. Before they get cold we bounce with sugar.

worlds-marinara.name: World's Marinara
instructions: Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir onion and garlic until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add mushrooms, red bell pepper, and parsley; cook and stir until mushrooms are slightly softened, about 2 minutes. Add oregano, sugar, basil, rosemary, sage, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper; stir to combine, 2 minutes.
Stir tomato sauce into seasoned onion-mushroom mixture; cook over low heat until flavors have combined, 30 minutes.
Transfer half the sauce to a blender; blend until smooth. Return to saucepan with the remaining sauce; stir to combine.
